title: Elysium Spa Apple Scented Dinosaur Bath Dust (Pack of 2)
features: The information below applies to each unit in the pack
BATHTIME FUN: Elysium Spa Dinosaur Bath Dust adds fizzy, green apple scented fun at bathtime. Simply sprinkle into the bath and watch it gently fizz, releasing the juicy green apple scent.

100 PercentNATURAL: Elysium Spa Epsom Salt is magnesium sulphate, a pure mineral compound with a variety of uses. Generations of people have relied on its natural values, as it absorbs through the skin's surface to gently help support the removal of toxins.
SOOTHE & RELAX: Perfect for those with an extremely active lifestyle. Helping you soothe all those aches and pains that come with it.

GROWN UPS INDULGE: Not just for children! Take the roar out of your day with a sprinkling of Dinosaur Dust, adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Ready to use, resealable bag 400g
description: Product Description Elysium Spa Dinosaur Bath Dust adds fizzy, green apple scented fun at bathtime. Simply sprinkle into the bath and watch it gently fizz, releasing the juicy green apple scent. All the benefits of our popular Elysium Spa Epsom Salts in an easy to use bath dust. Not just for children! Take the roar out of your day with a sprinkling of Dinosaur Dust, adding epsom salts to a bath will help the relaxation of the body and mind to promote a restful night's sleep. Ready to use resealable bag 400g. Directions Check bathwater temperature, fill tub, add product, and mix into water. Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. See more
